products.name: Seasonal Allergy Bundle
products.description_text: Spring allergies don't start in your sinuses, they start in your gut. This bundle is the complete approach. Formulated to seal the gut barrier, rebalance your immune system, and support healthy histamine breakdown so you can get ahead of allergy season instead of chasing it.
products.best_for: Individuals looking to proactively manage seasonal allergies through gut and immune support.

products.name: Whole Package + Her Package Bundle
products.description_text: Two powerful supplements in one bundle designed for shared wellness. Whole Package supports male hormone, energy, and performance goals, while Her Package supports female hormonal balance, menstrual comfort, and vitality. Premium organ-based nutrition for daily support.
products.best_for: Ideal for couples seeking comprehensive hormonal and energy support.

products.name: Grass-Fed Colostrum
products.description_text: Grass-Fed Colostrum is a complete whole food. Known as nature’s “first milk”, it supports gut health, immune system function, and exercise recovery by delivering bioavailable nutrients and growth factors sourced from premium-quality, 100% grass-fed cattle.†
products.best_for: Individuals looking to support their gut health, immune system, and recovery from exercise.

products.name: Grass-Fed Thyroid+

products.name: Grass-Fed Whey Unflavored
products.description_text: Grass-Fed Whey is a cold-processed, NSF Certified for Sport® protein powder made from 100% grass-fed Australian cows — with absolutely nothing artificial. Designed for high-performers who demand more from their nutrition, it delivers fast-absorbing protein and uncompromising purity to fuel performance and recovery. Available in Unflavored and Chocolate Sea Salt No added hormones, fillers, gums, or lecithins NSF Certified for Sport® and 100% grass-fed Independently tested for heavy metals, pesticides & impurities 100% plastic-free packaging (including the scoop!)
products.best_for: High-performers seeking a pure, fast-absorbing protein source for enhanced performance and recovery.
